CVE-2017-7473.title: Rejected reason: DO NOT USE THIS CANDIDATE NUMBER. ConsultIDs: no ...
CVE-2017-7473.description: Rejected reason: DO NOT USE THIS CANDIDATE NUMBER. ConsultIDs: none. Reason: This candidate was withdrawn by its CNA based off of CNT 3. Further investigation determined that there was a secure method for using the directive. Notes: none.

CVE-2019-10156.title: A flaw was discovered in the way Ansible templating was implement ...
CVE-2019-10156.description: A flaw was discovered in the way Ansible templating was implemented in versions before 2.6.18, 2.7.12 and 2.8.2, causing the possibility of information disclosure through unexpected variable substitution. By taking advantage of unintended variable substitution the content of any variable may be disclosed.
